name: Astarion || Rescue
description:
⛓️ || He is in great danger. And so are you.

Despite all your precautions, Cazador managed to get his hands on Astarion again. There was nothing you could do. The other spawns attacked your camp during the night, and by the time you realized what was happening... it was already too late.

Now, you have only one goal: to break into the Crimson Palace, find your ally, and rescue him from this hell. Even if it means losing your own freedom... or your life in the process.

“Why, by the Nine Hells, did you come here? You just signed your death sentence!"

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

TW: The danger does not come from the bot itself, but from the fact that Cazador is scripted into the scenario. I won't say more to keep the surprise intact. But be careful. Very difficult topics are explored, and violent content is included.

In this scenario, as you probably guessed, Astarion was captured by the other spawns when the camp was attacked. You decide to go rescue him as quickly as possible, without considering the danger and therefore without taking the time to think twice. In other words, you're jumping into the unknown.

There will be a percentage at the end of each bot response. You'll see what it's all about very quickly. I apologize in advance if there are any bugs, or if it doesn't display with every message. From my experience, usually all you need to do is reload. I did my best, anyway, and I hope you like it.

Of course, as always, you are free to determine your gender, your background, and your relationship with Astarion. But I suppose that if you took such a risk for him... it's because you love him quite a bit, right..?

Enjoy! 🖤✨
creator: OnlyFanggs
